query: UPDATE monthly_metrics SET arrUsd = '14321' WHERE aeId = 30002 AND year = 2026 AND month = 1; INSERT INTO monthly_metrics (aeId, year, month, arrUsd, demosTotal, dialsTotal, connectedDials, retentionRate) SELECT 30002, 2026, 3, '14600', 0, 0, 0, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM monthly_metrics WHERE aeId = 30002 AND year = 2026 AND month = 3);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute UPDATE monthly_metrics SET arrUsd = '14321' WHERE aeId = 30002 AND year = 2026 AND month = 1; INSERT INTO monthly_metrics (aeId, year, month, arrUsd, demosTotal, dialsTotal, connectedDials, retentionRate) SELECT 30002, 2026, 3, '14600', 0, 0, 0, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM monthly_metrics WHERE aeId = 30002 AND year = 2026 AND month = 3);
